Class ProbabilisticErrors

java.lang.Object
org.infinispan.server.resp.commands.ProbabilisticErrors
public final class ProbabilisticErrors extends Object
Shared error message constants for probabilistic data structure commands (Bloom filters, Cuckoo filters, Count-Min Sketch, Top-K). These match the exact error strings returned by Redis module commands.
